notes.body: #1910 Muncie, IN: Kenneth Smith, GM Store #1910, no longer employed with Estep & Company effective immediately. Direct all questions or items for #1910 to Andrew Campbell (DM) or Brad Davis (Director).

Weekly GM/AGM call CANCELED this week — watch for a reschedule. Standing: Mia 1704 recognition (bar for Value Enthusiasm); hub tickets required for all outside-vendor maintenance (tracking + warranty).
Enter next-day delivery orders before 11:00 AM. Miss the window = no next-day delivery.
New AGM application: Kea Sanders + 1 other applied (Louisville). Review and respond so we don't lose them.
